focus: adjudication of iter-10 false positives + graph-metadata edge symmetry + description.json consistency

findingsRetracted.description: rule-in-runtime-files - RETRACTED: .claude/CLAUDE.md and .codex/AGENTS.md are scoped to runtime-specific concerns by design, not framework rules. feedback_agents_md_sync_triad memory confirms sync triad is canonical + Barter.
skill count 21 vs 22 - RETRACTED: ls count of 22 includes README.md; actual skill count is ls -1d .opencode/skills/*/ | wc -l = 21. README is correct.

findingsNew.description: manual.related_to asymmetry: sk-small-model includes cli-devin/cli-opencode in manual.related_to, but cli-devin/cli-opencode do not include sk-small-model. edges.enhances is symmetric (all three have mutual enhances weight 0.5), but manual.related_to is not.
findingsNew.counterevidenceSought: None - asymmetry directly observable in the files
findingsNew.alternativeExplanation: Could be intentional if manual.related_to is meant to be directional (only declared by dependent skill)
findingsNew.downgradeTrigger: If documentation explicitly states manual.related_to is directional and asymmetry is expected
findingsNew.impact: Reduces advisor lane signal quality - graph_causal lane reads from both ends, asymmetry may cause incomplete relationship discovery

findingsNew.description: Missing description.json files for cli-devin and cli-opencode. Only sk-small-model has description.json with complete schema (name, description, version, importance_tier, keywords, trigger_examples). Inconsistent metadata file presence across skills.
findingsNew.counterevidenceSought: None - files definitively absent (read failed: not found)
findingsNew.alternativeExplanation: Could be that description.json is optional for CLI skills and only required for utility skills
findingsNew.downgradeTrigger: If skill documentation explicitly states description.json is optional for CLI skills
findingsNew.impact: May impact advisor/discovery systems that rely on description.json for skill summaries, automated skill catalog generation, and user-facing documentation completeness
